title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
